mapper.sql: SELECT order_id, order_no, equipment_id, equipment_code, equipment_name, order_type, fault_description, reporter_id, reporter_name, report_time, priority, order_status, assignee_id, assignee_name, assign_time, arrive_time, sla_response_deadline, sla_process_deadline, sla_timeout_status, sla_escalated, fault_cause, repair_measure, spare_parts_used, task_checklist, downtime_duration, complete_time, complete_remark, deviation_reason, assigner_id, assigner_name, verifier_id, verifier_name, verify_time, verify_opinion, rating, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dms_work_order
mapper.select: SELECT order_no FROM dms_work_order ORDER BY order_no DESC LIMIT 1

WHERE del_flag = '0' AND sla_escalated = '0' AND order_status IN ('0','1','2','3') AND ( (sla_response_deadline IS NOT NULL AND sla_response_deadline < NOW() AND order_status IN ('0')) OR (sla_process_deadline IS NOT NULL AND sla_process_deadline < NOW() AND order_status IN ('1','2','3')) ) ORDER BY order_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dms_work_order ( order_no, equipment_id, equipment_code, equipment_name, order_type, fault_description, reporter_id, reporter_name, report_time, priority, order_status, assignee_id, assignee_name, assign_time, arrive_time, sla_response_deadline, sla_process_deadline, sla_timeout_status, sla_escalated, fault_cause, repair_measure, spare_parts_used, task_checklist, downtime_duration, complete_time, complete_remark, deviation_reason, assigner_id, assigner_name, verifier_id, verifier_name, verify_time, verify_opinion, rating, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentCode}, #{equipmentName}, #{orderType}, #{faultDescription}, #{reporterId}, #{reporterName}, #{reportTime}, #{priority}, #{orderStatus}, #{assigneeId}, #{assigneeName}, #{assignTime}, #{arriveTime}, #{slaResponseDeadline}, #{slaProcessDeadline}, #{slaTimeoutStatus}, #{slaEscalated}, #{faultCause}, #{repairMeasure}, #{sparePartsUsed}, #{taskChecklist}, #{downtimeDuration}, #{completeTime}, #{completeRemark}, #{deviationReason}, #{assignerId}, #{assignerName}, #{verifierId}, #{verifierName}, #{verifyTime}, #{verifyOpinion}, #{rating}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_work_order SET del_flag = '2' WHERE order_id IN #{orderId}
